title: Part 2: Ditto on Borg and the Borg to GCP crossover

cues.label: Two locations
cues.headline: Job here, model there
cues.narration: The eval runs in one place and the model lives in another, so an eval is really a round trip between two systems.

cues.label: Ditto on Borg
cues.headline: The runner runs on Borg
cues.narration: Ditto is the eval runner and it executes as a job on Borg, Google's cluster scheduler, while the model it grades is hosted on GCP.

cues.label: The crossover
cues.headline: Bridge the two worlds
cues.narration: Auth, networking, and routing between Borg and GCP are the crossover, and that bridge is what Sindhu is stuck on, which blocks the eval runs.

cues.label: Serving surfaces
cues.headline: Aim at the right runtime
cues.narration: The same weights run on two serving surfaces, vLLM and Hugging Face, so an eval must target the correct one or the number can drift.
